commit.message:
Phase 3: Unified confidence tiers and health check citations (#101)

* Phase 3: Unified confidence tiers and citation links

Replace ad-hoc uncertainty language ("Sparse data", "benefit of the
doubt") with a three-tier confidence system:
- verified: no badge, score shown normally (was HIGH)
- estimated: "Estimated" badge + explanation (was MEDIUM/LOW with score)
- not_scored: "Not scored" badge, numeric score suppressed (new)

Key changes:
- Road noise returns not_scored when Overpass data unavailable instead
  of inflating with a 7/10 "benefit of the doubt" score
- Composite score excludes not_scored dimensions from both numerator
  and denominator (skips rather than treats as zero)
- HEALTH_CHECK_CITATIONS in scoring_config.py maps check IDs to
  hyperlinked sources rendered in "Why we check this" expandables
- present_checks() attaches citations to each check's presentation dict
- _migrate_confidence_tiers() converts old HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW snapshots
  to new tier names across all deserialization paths
- Template badges: "Estimated" replaces "Limited data"/"Sparse data",
  "Not scored" is new with score suppression
- Legacy confidence values preserved in _CONFIDENCE_SCORE_CAP for
  backward compatibility

https://claude.ai/code/session_01BAPq3D6K8vWnUeJSvuR62e

* Fix 3 broken citation URLs

- HEI Special Report 17: add missing slug suffix
  (-emissions-exposure-and-health)
- CDC highway proximity: replace dead page with MMWR
  Supplement su6203a8 (same underlying report)
- FRA safety data: replace 503-returning safetydata.fra.dot.gov
  with cms8.fra.dot.gov/safety-data portal

https://claude.ai/code/session_01BAPq3D6K8vWnUeJSvuR62e

* Fix compare route missing shallow copy + remove dead CSS

- Compare route now shallow-copies snapshot result dict before
  running migrations, matching the pattern in view_snapshot()
  and preventing future cache corruption
- Remove unreachable .confidence-summary.confidence-not_scored
  CSS rule (not_scored is excluded from aggregate summary)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01BAPq3D6K8vWnUeJSvuR62e

* Fix export route shallow copies + CLAUDE.md lessons

- export_snapshot_json and export_snapshot_csv were mutating
  the stored snapshot dict during migration — now shallow-copy
  first, matching the pattern in view_snapshot and compare
- Add CLAUDE.md lessons: snapshot migration shallow-copy rule,
  composite not_scored exclusion, confidence tier decision log,
  citation URL verification requirement

https://claude.ai/code/session_01BAPq3D6K8vWnUeJSvuR62e

* Simplify: deduplicate migration, single-pass confidence aggregation

- Extract _migrate_item_confidence() helper to eliminate copy-paste
  between tier2_scores and dimension_summaries migration loops
- Consolidate triple-pass over tier2_scores in result_to_dict() into
  a single loop that classifies confidence, limited, and not_scored
  dimensions in one iteration
- Remove dead legacy aliases ("LOW"/"MEDIUM"/"HIGH") from _rank dict
  and _limited_dims filter — result_to_dict() only processes fresh
  evaluations that already use new constants
- Update tests to use CONFIDENCE_* constants instead of legacy strings

https://claude.ai/code/session_01BAPq3D6K8vWnUeJSvuR62e

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(SCRUM-152): prevent OAuth callback filter from leaking internal error details (#41)

OAuthCallbackFilter was extracting raw exception messages and passing them
to the frontend via ?error= URL param, enabling mechanism fingerprinting.
Now always returns generic "Authentication failed" and logs actual errors
server-side. OAuth state validation errors in both strategies also unified.

commit.message:
Fix shopping item saving and de-grocery the UX

Root cause: quantity schema expected z.number() but frontend sends strings
(e.g. "2 lbs"). Zod rejected the request silently. Changed to z.string()
to match DB column type (TEXT) and frontend behavior.

Also reworked shopping page to be general-purpose:
- Removed hardcoded grocery quick-add buttons (Milk, Eggs, etc.)
- Added list templates: Groceries, Wishlist, Home & Hardware, Errands
- Made category picker optional (collapsed by default)
- Updated all copy to be store-agnostic
- Improved empty states and list creation modal
- Better item grouping (flat list when no categories assigned)
- Optimistic delete for items

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add celebration popups, mixed subjects, badges, leaderboard, age-appropriate content

- Celebration popup with witty phrases + 2x bonus points for correct answers
- Remove post-math (only math before activity now)
- Mixed subjects: telling time, spelling, counting, shapes, patterns by grade
- Age-appropriate challenges for young (Pre-K/K) vs school age (1st-2nd)
- 12 achievement badges with popup notifications
- Leaderboard on welcome screen ranked by position

with static bursts, per-station synth chains, keyboard/touch controls.

Training Q: rebuilt as Illmatic-style documentary — 5 chapters telling

QWEN MATIC, a 12-track debut album with Spotify-style player,
full lyrics (16-24 lines each), Web Audio procedural beats, and
line-by-line lyric highlighting.

commit.message:
Harden CID intent detection: advice vs modification boundary

- Strengthen prompt: explicit examples that "what are best practices?"
  is ADVICE even when it relates to an existing node (Safety Check)
- Add code-level guard in chatWithCID: if user asked a pure question
  (what/how/should/why without action verbs), strip accidental
  modifications that the LLM returns
- Add speed/optimize/faster/slow to isBuildOrModify regex so
  optimization requests get generate taskType (higher temp, longer
  timeout)
- Stronger modification instruction: "NEVER return workflow when
  modifying — rebuilding destroys user work"
- All 13 chatbot tests pass: build, optimize, add feature, advice,
  remove, rename, ambiguous, empty canvas

v1.4.2: 텔레그램 전송 안정성 개선

- _send() 재시도 로직 추가: 실패 시 5초 간격으로 최대 2회 재시도 (앱 시작 직후 SSL 초기화 충돌 대응)

Replace HMAC worker auth with API key auth in swatch-swipe backend

Use the standard Starflask API endpoints (/agents/{id}/fire_hook,
/agents/{id}/sessions/{id}) with Bearer API key auth instead of the
internal worker API with HMAC-SHA256. Removes hmac, sha2, hex crates.

Env var change: STARFLASK_SECRET_KEY → STARFLASK_API_KEY

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Bugs 108-110 — stage strip, negative duration guard, is_true all-caps

Bug 108: All stage/status comparisons used .lower() without .strip() —
CRM API data often has trailing whitespace; "Closed Won " never matched
"Closed Won". Fixed in 5 hint locations across 4 categories.

Bug 109: sales_cycle_understanding and handle_time didn't guard e >= s.
Bad/mismatched date data (close before create) produced negative durations
skewing min/max/avg. Fixed: if s and e and e >= s: durations.append(...)

Bug 110: is_true() in conversion_rate_comprehension hint was missing 'TRUE'
and 'YES' all-caps variants (system prompt had 'TRUE' but hint didn't).
Fixed: added 'TRUE', 'YES' to is_true() value set.

Fix view transition jank: scroll restoration, solid slides, no skeleton flash

- Add ScrollRestoration component inside Layout for proper scroll handling
  during view transitions (prevents scroll-jump-then-settle)
- Lateral tab slides now 100% translateX with no opacity change, same
  duration/easing on both old and new snapshots so content stays fully
  solid like a native app carousel
- Set isolation:auto on view-transition-image-pair during lateral slides
  to prevent the default crossfade compositing
- Remove 50-150ms artificial delay from mock service (Promise.resolve()
  instead of setTimeout) - this was the main cause of skeleton flashing
- Race store no longer clears selectedRace to null on new fetch, keeping
  old data visible during the transition instead of flashing skeleton
- RaceDetailPage loading check simplified: show skeleton when no race
  data AND no error (covers first mount cleanly)

commit.message:
Add compile-time type validation for bit access

Reject bit access on unsupported types (BOOL, REAL, LREAL, TIME, STRING,
WSTRING, named types) and validate bit index is within range for the
target type's width (e.g. BYTE allows bit0..bit7, DINT allows bit0..bit31).

commit.message:
Classify Cl5_10_DefaultValue → §10.9.2 [skip ci]

The test uses '{default:0} — an assignment pattern with the `default` key applied to a struct type. §10.9.2 (Structure assignment patterns) is the subclause that defines the `default` keyword within structure assignment patterns.

- handleManageExportFlows (21→8): extract buildExportOptions, exportFlowsToFile, exportFlowsInline
- (*hookExecutor).runMacro (19→9): extract loadAndBuildMacroDeps, checkMacroStepsTargetScopeDeps
- validateRawPatch (17→6): extract validatePatchModeCount, validateOffsetPatchFields, validateBinaryFindPatchFields, validateTextFindPatchFields

Refs: USK-256

commit.message:
Fix AI chat image upload: timeout, error handling, and logging

- Add 90-second timeout on API fetch to prevent infinite hangs
- Fix parseSSELine silently swallowing Claude API errors
- Always include a text block in multimodal messages (providers may
  reject content arrays without text)
- Ensure non-empty content for all messages (empty strings → fallback)
- Show actual API error messages on client instead of generic
  "Connection lost"
- Add server-side logging for file processing and API request details
- Handle non-JSON error responses from server (e.g. CSRF 403)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix orders loading mock data before authentication

The fetch effect was running immediately on mount with the
anonymous key, which RLS blocks, returning empty data and
falling back to getMockOrders(). Now the effect waits for
currentUser to be set before fetching and subscribing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace finding type key strings with type-safe enums (#59) (#90)

* Replace finding type key strings with type-safe enums (#59)

Add FindingTypeKey enum to business layer, FindingTypeEntityKey for DB
layers, and FindingTypeDtoKey for API layers. Each layer has its own
internal enum with mappers, so changes in the business model don't
affect persistence or API serialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Simplify API mapper Triple pattern with safe cast

Replace Triple destructuring with direct safe cast to FindingType.Classic,
removing redundant toDtoKey() calls and Triple allocations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Move toEntityKey/toDtoKey mappers into Mapper files

commit.message:
Streaming module compiler + 75 std modules — 265/265 tests pass

Refactored compile-and-load-module to stream compiled forms directly
to disk instead of accumulating in memory. This reduces peak memory
usage and unblocks previously OOM-causing modules like :std/cli/getopt.

Added getopt, instance, config to module loader tests. Moved
string-replace helper before its first use.

commit.message:
Refactor SubDay commands.py: extract helpers and clarify backfill logic

- Extract _milestone_prize_teaser() to deduplicate prize-teaser block
  shared between _owned_sub_status_embed and _own_progress_embed
- Extract _try_post_achievement_embed() to deduplicate try/except
  pattern used twice in _post_achievement; remove PLR0912 suppression
- Extract _notify_sub_of_owner_decision() to merge shared DM+log tail
  from _handle_owner_approve and _handle_owner_deny; takes guild_name
  string instead of full guild_state object
- Rename backfill_week → requested_week + is_backfill bool in
  SubDayComplete.invoke to eliminate dual-meaning variable
- Fix audit log gap: when week==current_week and sent:True, guild log
  now records the advancement (previously showed plain completion)

commit.message:
feat: DevMetrics v0.1.0 — base project structure

FastAPI + SQLite developer productivity metrics API with:
- Team, Developer, Commit, PR, Deployment CRUD
- Pydantic schemas for API validation
- Migration-based schema management
- Async database layer (aiosqlite)
- Custom exception hierarchy
- Basic test setup with in-memory DB

Known issues intentionally left for automated fixing:
- SQL injection in commits.list_commits()
- ZeroDivisionError in commits.get_commit_stats()
- merge_pr() doesn't validate current state
- No authentication middleware
- No pagination on list endpoints
- Missing /metrics/summary endpoint
- No rate limiting
- Incomplete test coverage

commit.message: fix(security): Pass 13 audit — 6 fixes across 6 files EMAIL13-001/ADMIN13-001: multiaccount.php — sendAdminAlertEmail() now validates ADMIN_ALERT_EMAIL with filter_var(FILTER_VALIDATE_EMAIL) before passing to mail(). Invalid address logs a warning and returns. INFRA13-001: csrf.php — CSRF failure redirect used HTTP_HOST (client- controlled) for Referer host comparison. Now uses SERVER_NAME, consistent with Origin check above it. MAP13-001: attaquer.php — array bounds check used >= 0 while DB query uses > 0. Standardized to > 0 to prevent (0,0) coordinate pollution in the carte array. ALLIANCE13-002: allianceadmin.php — invite flow did not check if target player is game-banned (estExclu=1). Added JOIN on membre to verify estExclu=0 before inserting invitation. RPT13-001/RPT12-002: game_actions.php + game_resources.php — malformed HTML img tags had self-closing slash before class attribute. Fixed to standard format: . Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Classify Cl5_10_MemberNameAndValue → §10.9.2 [skip ci]

The test uses `'{a:0, b:0.0}` — a structure assignment pattern with `member_identifier : expression` keys. §10.9.2 "Structure assignment patterns" is the normative subclause that defines the `member:value` key form for structs, confirmed on LRM page 263.

* perf: sub-6s analysis pipeline — Gemini timeout, fast retry, hard caps

- Gemini await: 1.5s grace after sidecar completes via Task.WhenAny
  (Gemini runs in parallel ~5s, gets 6.5s total before skip)
- Gemini Polly: 8s attempt / 10s total (was 90s/120s)
- Hangfire retry: 5/15/30/60/120s (was 30/60/120/300/600s)
- Job timeout: 30s (was 15 minutes)
